## Description

A clear and concise description of the changes in this PR.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Internal refactoring

## Checklist

- [ ] My code passes linting and formatting (`bun run lint` & `bun run fmt`)
- [ ] I have added a changeset if needed (`bun run changeset`)
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally (`bun run test`)

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots to help explain the UI changes.
